title: cenchrus biflorus
intro: Cenchrus biflorus, also known as the Bristle Grass or Two-flowered Bristle Grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus biflorus include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Cenchrus biflorus include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
